sutta: monks if wanderers of other views should question you thus where answers are all things rooted what is their origin what gives rise to all things what is their confluence what is their chief state what is their master state what is their further state and of all things what is most precious monks thus questioned how would you answer those wonders of other views lord our ideas have their foundation in the exalted 1 they are guided by the exalted 1 and are protected by him well indeed worried for us if the exalted 1 were to make clear the purpose of this speech then on hearing it the monks would bear it in mind therefore monks listen pay heed i will speak yes lord they replied and the exalted 1 said if monks wondrous of other views should so question you answer them thus references all things are rooted in desire they have their origin in attention contact gives rise to them their confluence is feeling that chief stayed as concentration mindfulness is their master state wisdom their further state and of all things liberation is the most precious monks that's questions so should you answer and these things and i think you have to think about them not contemplating to see the meaning huh i won't explain them you know
